title: microlepia novae-zelandiae
intro: Microlepia novae-zelandiae, also known as New Zealand fern, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, a group of small to medium-sized ferns. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Microlepia novae-zelandiae include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
